column1: # One row per case. Tab-separated. Lines beginning with '#' and blank lines are
#   case_id      Directory under corpus/ and expected/ for this case.
#   script       Skill whose transition-status.sh is the oracle (the type).
#   doc_relpath  Repo-relative path of the input doc inside the case's corpus
#                tree (the path passed to the script / subcommand, run from the
#                repo root). For moving types this encodes the source directory.
#   target       Target status (may contain a space, e.g. "In Progress").
#   flag         Engine flag the script's 3rd positional maps to:
#   arg3         Value for the 3rd script arg / engine flag, or '-' for none.
# The capture script runs each oracle in a fresh temp git repo (so git-mv and
# staged state are represented) and records result.json, exit, final_path, and
# final_content. The parity test runs `shirabe transition` the same way,
# translating arg3 into the named flag, and asserts structural-JSON equality,
# the exact exit code, the resulting file path, and the resulting file content.
